meta.title: AI Agents, Automation & Workflows
meta.description: AI automation and workflow expert building local-first LLM agents, Claude Code plugins, MCP servers, and applied adversarial ML. Production-ready AI integrated into real engineering pipelines.

hero.title: AI Engineering & Agent Development
hero.description: AI engineering for the web, hands-on - local-first LLM coding agents, Claude Code plugins, MCP servers, browser-native ML, and the occasional experiment in breaking my own models. This page tracks what I'm shipping into AI-enabled web development.

items: Local-first coding agents (Ollama, Gemma, ReAct loops)
Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for real dev workflows
Adversarial examples & model robustness in NLP

tools.name: nip
tools.description: A local-first CLI code agent powered by Gemma on Ollama. Implements a ReAct loop with tool-calling so it can read, write, and refactor code on your machine with no cloud calls and no vendor lock-in.

tools.name: claude-human-review
tools.description: A Claude Code plugin that narrates every edit the agent makes in plain English, so you can approve or undo with full context. Born out of distrust of silent diffs - human-in-the-loop without the friction.

tools.name: article-writing-skills
tools.description: A collection of writing prompts and Claude skills modelled on the voices of famous engineers and researchers. Works with Claude Code, ChatGPT, Gemini, and any LLM - a testbed for how far prompt-shaped style transfer can go.

tools.name: MERN MCP
tools.description: An open-source Model Context Protocol server that automates full-stack CRUD scaffolding for MERN apps - from Mongoose models to React components - with a preview-before-apply workflow so the agent stays on a leash.

tools.name: BG Remover AI
tools.description: A fast, private, serverless background removal tool running entirely in the browser via ONNX models. No uploads, no tracking - exploring how much real ML can ship to the client in 2026.

lines: $ nip "refactor getUser to async/await and add a cache"
> plan: promisify callback, wrap with async, add LRU layer
